action.reasoning: Observation: the PairMPNNv2 architectural change worsened MAE (0.1569) compared with the best PairMPNN h192/l4 checkpoint (0.1364 test, 0.1347 val). Analysis: the original simpler PairMPNN is the stronger architecture so far and appears undertrained; the 12-epoch run took ~268s, so a 20-epoch run should fit comfortably in the remaining time and respects the <=20 epoch rule. Decision: train the best-known PairMPNN configuration longer for 20 epochs from scratch and submit the resulting best-validation checkpoint.
